articles.title: DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games
articles.description: Nvidia announced DLSS 5 on Monday during its GTC conference, and based on early reactions, it's going to be a divisive update, with some reactions calling it "slop" that unacceptably alters artistic intent. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is calling this the "GPT moment for graphics - blending hand-crafted rendering with generative AI to deliver a […]
articles.author: Cameron FaulknerRichard Lawler

articles.title: Teens sue Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok’s AI-generated CSAM
articles.description: Three Tennessee teens are suing Elon Musk's xAI over claims that the company's Grok AI chatbot generated sexualized images and videos of themselves as minors, as reported earlier by The Washington Post. The proposed class action lawsuit, filed on Monday, accuses Musk and other xAI leaders of knowing that Grok would produce AI-generated child sexual […]
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: Ecovacs’ Deebot X8 and X9 Pro Omni robovacs are nearly 50 percent off
articles.description: If you like the idea of spring cleaning but not the part where you actually have to clean, both the Ecovacs Deebot X8 Pro Omni and newer X9 Pro Omni have dropped to their lowest prices to date ahead of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which officially kicks off on March 25th. The X8 Pro Omni is available […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: Benjamin Netanyahu is struggling to prove he's not an AI clone
articles.description: Social media platforms are currently awash with conspiracy theories claiming that Benjamin Netanyahu has been killed or injured and replaced by AI-generated deepfakes. Between clips that supposedly show the Israeli prime minister sporting extra fingers and drinking from a bottomless, gravity-defying cup of coffee, only one thing is apparent: Reality used to be much easier […]
articles.author: Jess Weatherbed

articles.title: Nvidia says China’s BYD and Geely will use its robotaxi platform
articles.description: Nvidia added two leading Chinese automakers, BYD and Geely, to its robotaxi program, as the chipmaker seeks to put its stamp on the growing autonomous vehicle market worldwide. At its GTC conference today, Nvidia announced that BYD and Geely, as well as Isuzu and Nissan, would use the chipmaker's Drive Hyperion platform, which combines the […]
articles.author: Andrew J. Hawkins

articles.title: I met Olaf — the Frozen robot who might be the future of Disney Parks
articles.description: You know Olaf. Before KPop Demon Hunters, before the Wicked movies, it was Disney's Frozen that blasted show tunes like "Let It Go" and "Into the Unknown" into our lives. My little girls loved belting those tunes. So when I met Olaf, the Disney Imagineering robot, I kept thinking: I can't wait for my kids […]
articles.author: Sean Hollister

articles.title: Sony's AI graphics upscaling for PS5 Pro games is getting a big update tonight
articles.description: Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) technology is rolling out to several titles on the PS5 Pro, including Cyberpunk 2077, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, Silent Hill 2, and more. Digital Foundry got a chance to test some of them and found that the "new upscaler delivers the kind of upgrade we were looking for […]
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: Encyclopedia Britannica is suing OpenAI for allegedly ‘memorizing’ its content with ChatGPT
articles.description: On Friday, Encyclopedia Britannica and dictionary publisher Merriam-Webster filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging that it used their copyrighted content to train its AI, then generated responses that were "substantially similar" to their content, as previously reported by Reuters. According to Britannica, OpenAI repeatedly copied its content without permission, stating, "GPT-4 itself has 'memorized' much […]
articles.author: Stevie Bonifield

articles.title: Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Max and 4K Plus sticks are up to 50 percent off
articles.description: Since Amazon rolled out its redesigned Fire TV OS, Amazon’s latest streaming sticks are even better than ever. And right now, both the Fire TV Stick 4K Max and Fire TV Stick 4K Plus are back at their best prices yet during Amazon’s early Big Spring Sale event. You can buy the Fire TV Stick […]
